overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a snowy mountain landscape at night, rendered in a game engine. The camera moves steadily through narrow rocky passages and open snow fields, approaching and passing a distant wooden cabin structure. Atmospheric winter lighting with overcast night sky and snow-covered terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain pass between rock outcrops

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow between rocky outcrops and snow-laden pine trees

entered.detail: tall rock formation covered in snow flanking the left side of the path
snow-covered evergreen trees in the center of the narrow passage
rocky outcrop on the right side heavily blanketed in snow

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, enclosed mountain pass with snow-covered rock walls on both sides. The camera moves forward through deep snow among dense, snow-laden pine trees. The lighting is dim with a cool blue tone, suggesting nighttime in winter.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy mountain slope with scattered trees

events.description: exits narrow rocky passage into wider open mountain area
camera tilts upward to view the overcast night sky and moon

agents.ego_description: continuing forward while looking up at the overcast sky, observing the ambient light through the clouds

entered.detail: dark cloudy sky with faint moonlight breaking through the overcast
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide snowy slope as the camera exits the narrow passage. The vegetation becomes more scattered, and the camera tilts upward to reveal the overcast night sky. Distant mountain ridges become visible on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy hillside approaching a wooden mountain cabin

events.description: wooden mountain cabin structure becomes visible on the hillside ahead

agents.ego_description: walking toward a snow-covered wooden cabin nestled among the trees on the hillside

entered.detail: snow-covered wooden structure with sloped roof situated on the hillside
large rock formation partially buried in snow

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wooden mountain cabin situated on a snowy hillside. The structure becomes increasingly prominent as the camera moves forward, passing from center view to the left side. Snow-covered boulders and scattered pine trees surround the approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow field with scattered rocks and sparse trees

events.description: passes the wooden cabin and enters open terrain beyond

agents.ego_description: continuing through open snow fields past the structure, moving toward distant tree line

entered.detail: scattered evergreen trees in the open snow field ahead

segments.scene_description: Having passed the wooden cabin, the camera moves through an open snow field with sparse vegetation. Large snow-covered boulders dot the landscape, and the terrain opens up toward a distant tree line under the overcast night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic mountain pass into a vast, open snowy wilderness under a night sky. It begins by pushing forward through a narrow corridor of snow-covered rock walls and dense, snow-laden pine trees bathed in a dim, cool blue light. As the camera exits the passage, the environment expands into a wide snowy slope where the vegetation thins and the view tilts upward to reveal an overcast sky and distant mountain ridges. The scene then shifts toward a wooden mountain cabin on a hillside, which grows more prominent before the camera glides past it to the left. Finally, the perspective moves through an open snow field dotted with large boulders, heading toward a distant tree line under the dark winter expanse.
